Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Proposed Intervenor JACK NEAL's Motion For Leave To Intervene is denied. Mr. Neal has not shown that he has a right to intervene nor has he shown good cause to permit him to intervene per the court's discretion. Civil Code 1781(e)(3) is inapplicable to this case. Mr. Neal's motion is untimely. Mr. Neal's counsel has known about the tentative settlement in this case since April 2016, yet took no action to intervene till ten months later long after the settlement was preliminarily approved and just prior to the final approval hearing.
